aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: MEGAESTE is a modern healthcare center that brings together technology and aesthetics, established to provide international standard healthcare services in the fields of aesthetic surgery, medical aesthetics, and hair transplantation.
aboutUs.mission: Acting with the vision of providing reliable, high-quality, and accessible solutions in aesthetics and beauty since its establishment, MEGAESTE provides superior service to patients coming from both domestic and abroad with its center in Istanbul.
aboutUs.vision: With its innovative medical technologies, experienced specialist medical staff, and patient satisfaction-oriented professional team, MEGAESTE has become a contemporary and reliable reference center in the field of aesthetic and plastic surgery.
aboutUs.approach: It provides healthcare services at international quality standards with personalized treatment approaches for each patient.
aboutUs.bookTitle: Take the First Step Towards Your Beauty
aboutUs.bookDesc: Fill out the form to get a free preliminary evaluation from our specialist doctors.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.subtitle: An Expert Touch for Your Health and Beauty
about.description: At Megaeste, we offer professional services in health and medical aesthetics with our expert staff and state-of-the-art equipment. We are always by your side to add value to your beauty with our innovative approaches and patient satisfaction-oriented vision.
